question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks zero didactic questions. It delivers a complete lecture in turn 1 and answers the student's questions in turn 2 without ever turning a question back to engage the student.

question_quality.rationale: No choices or forks are surfaced to the student. The Tutor presents the closed form, the recurrence, and Pascal's triangle connection all at once without prompting the student to derive any of it.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding — the first turn is a full solution dump including the answer, the closed form, three code variants, and a comparison table. No difficulty gradient because nothing is asked of the student.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the student's follow-up questions are answered clearly and accurately (especially the anti-diagonal correction). But the conversation is essentially lecture-then-clarification, not a back-and-forth pair-programming dialogue.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
